action: In Visual Studio Code, locate the play button (Run) at the top-right corner of the editor pane while calculator_app.py is open. Click the play button to run the Python file. Confirm when the file starts running and the output console appears.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to run the Python file 'calculator_app.py' in Visual Studio Code by clicking the play (Run) button at the top-right corner of the editor pane. The screen shows VS Code with 'calculator_app.py' open. I need to locate and click the play button to run the file. The play button is typically found near the top-right, often labeled 'Run' or with a play icon. Based on the detected bounding boxes, Box ID 10 ('Runs') is likely the play button.
